seniority.level: Senior IC (likely Senior PM / Program Manager)
level_signals: High-ownership role with significant autonomy and strategic decision-making
Comp range $255K-$320K base, consistent with Senior IC at Anthropic
5+ years preferred (listed under Preferred Qualifications, not Minimum)
Expected to 'own the student narrative company-wide'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven track record of building and scaling ambassador or community programs in education or edtech space
Track record of making strategic decisions with incomplete information and delivering results
Experience operating autonomously and driving outcomes without heavy oversight
Strong communication skills—you'll represent Anthropic to university leadership, partners, and across internal teams
Proven ability to manage complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives while keeping execution sharp
Comfort with travel for campus events and hackathons (estimated 5-10%)
Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of experience in program management, developer relations, community building, or campus engagement, with increasing scope and ownership over time
Experience building campus or student programs at a major technology company
Background in hackathon organization or developer community ecosystems
Technical fluency or hands-on experience with AI/ML
International program management experience across multiple regions
Experience with brand strategy or experiential marketing

scope.surface: Claude Campus Ambassador Program, Claude Builder Clubs, student hackathon partnerships, university outreach globally
scope.business_model: developer/student adoption play supporting Claude platform growth, B2C and B2B adjacent
primary_metrics_inferred: Claude awareness and usage on university campuses
Builder Club growth and community activity
Hackathon partnership volume and sponsorship effectiveness
core_responsibilities: Lead the Claude Campus Ambassador Program, recruiting, training, and supporting student ambassadors at universities worldwide
Build and scale Claude Builder Clubs to foster student communities around AI development
Design and execute brand activations and event programming tailored for student audiences
Develop overall strategy and positioning for Claude with the student persona
Manage student hackathon partnerships at scale, including sponsorships, judging, and mentorship programs
Lead outreach efforts to grow Claude awareness and usage on university campuses globally
Track and report on program metrics, continuously optimizing for impact and scale

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($255K-$320K base)
Visa sponsorship explicitly offered with genuine effort described
High-ownership, high-autonomy role with real strategic scope
Clear program areas named (Campus Ambassador Program, Builder Clubs, hackathons)
Encourages applications from underrepresented groups and those who don't meet every qualification
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time in San Francisco — eliminates fully-remote candidates
5+ years experience is listed as Preferred, not Minimum, creating ambiguity about actual seniority bar; compensation range ($255K-$320K) suggests a senior-level hire is expected
Minimum years of experience explicitly deferred to 'internal job level requirements' with no concrete number provided in Minimum Qualifications

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and role ownership signals; not stated explicitly)
scope.business_model (inferred from product context and student developer focus)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not enumerated in JD)
location.cities_listed (San Francisco inferred from HQ mention; no other city explicitly named for this role)
ambiguities: 5+ years of experience appears under Preferred Qualifications only, yet the comp range ($255K-$320K) and 'high-ownership' language imply a senior hire is expected. Treated as nice-to-have per JD structure but flagged.

Minimum years of experience section states 'Years of experience required will correlate with the internal job level requirements for the position' — no concrete number given in Minimum Qualifications section.
Travel requirement (5-10%) listed under Minimum Qualifications; classified as hard severity, though it reads closer to a logistical expectation than a skill.
